schedule-slots.title: Schedule slots
schedule-slots.content: Add time slots when you're available for lessons. Students will see them and can send a booking request.

booking-request.title: Booking request
booking-request.content: A student wants to book a lesson at the specified time. Accept or decline — the student will be notified.

nostr-key.title: Your Nostr keys
nostr-key.content: nsec is your private key — never share it. npub is your public address, safe to share. Tutorstr doesn't store keys on servers.

lesson-status.title: Lesson statuses
lesson-status.content: scheduled — upcoming lesson. completed — finished. canceled — the lesson won't take place.
